info.description: Links a character to a class and level
Tracks the verification status of this Entity Blueprint.

hash.description: Hash of the entity data at time of compilation (for change detection)

info.description: Features and resources gained at a specific level
Unified Tagging System for Entities, Terrains, and Knowledge
Voxel types and biome ground definitions
Procedural generation noise settings for biomes

octaves.description: Number of noise layers (Detail Level). Higher = more fine detail, but slower.

persistence.description: How much each octave contributes (Roughness). Higher = rougher, more chaotic terrain.

lacunarity.description: Frequency multiplier per octave (Gap). Higher = smaller, more fragmented features.

scale.description: Overall zoom level of the noise. Lower = zoomed in (large features), Higher = zoomed out.

height_offset.description: Base elevation shift. Positive = raises terrain, Negative = lowers terrain.

info.description: A source of knowledge, usually a markdown file.
A chunk of knowledge derived from a source.
Blueprint for World Entities (Creatures, Flora, Minerals)
An item in an inventory or slot
Unified item model (Equipment, Magic Items, Loot, Tools)
Stats for weapons, armor, and gear
Types of damage in the game
Reusable Action Definitions (Rich Structure - Spell Parity)

distance.description: Distance in feet (or miles if type matches)

aoe_size.description: Radius, Length, or Side length in feet

save_effect.description: What happens on a successful save? (None = Full Effect, Negate = No Effect, Half = Half Damage)

info.description: Rules for casting time and components

dice_count.description: Number of dice to add per interval

info.description: Trackable resources (HP, Spell Slots, Ki Points)
